title: Add isTokenExpired token checker
description: Create `src/auth/token-utils.ts` with `isTokenExpired(token: string): boolean` function that decodes a JWT (without signature verification) and checks if the `exp` claim is in the past. Include comprehensive tests covering valid token, expired token, and malformed token cases.
existing_patterns: src/auth/jwt-service.ts:6-11 - TokenPayload interface with exp claim definition
src/auth/jwt-service.ts:19-21 - base64urlDecode function to decode JWT body
src/auth/jwt-service.ts:84-89 - exp claim checking logic using `Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000)`
src/auth/jwt-service.test.ts - auth module tests co-located with implementation
src/utils/debounce.test.ts:1-11 - vitest fake timers pattern for time-sensitive tests
